M 56,37 L 93,47 Q 93,47 130,58 Q 130,58 186,52 Q 186,52 242,47 Q 242,47 298,52 Q 298,52 335,62 Q 335,62 353,71 Q 353,71 363,108 Q 363,108 359,155 Q 359,155 353,193 Q 353,193 348,221 Q 348,221 344,249 Q 344,249 340,277 Q 340,277 335,305 Q 335,305 326,352 Q 326,352 307,398 Q 307,398 288,436 Q 288,436 260,455 Q 260,455 214,473 Q 214,473 167,483 Q 167,483 121,473 Q 121,473 93,455 Q 93,455 65,417 Q 65,417 47,361 Q 47,361 37,305 Q 37,305 43,249 Q 43,249 56,193 Q 56,193 65,137 Q 65,137 61,90 Q 61,90 56,52 Q 56,52 56,37 Z
